lanes.name: Production-Grade Pipeline
lanes.narrative: Harden the engine — faster ingestion, clean state, and automatic freshness so every bible stays in sync with the source.

lanes.name: Export & Distribution
lanes.narrative: Get bibles out of the app and into the world — no-auth downloads, smooth GitHub integration, and a public URL for every bible.

lanes.name: Reading & Navigation
lanes.narrative: Make every bible as navigable as the IDE itself — deep links, search, and a responsive reader on any device.

lanes.name: Ask the Codebase
lanes.narrative: The embeddings have been there since day one — now use them to answer questions, find connections, and surface change risk across the whole tree.
